active.title: Active subscription
active.description: You have an active subscription. You can manage your subscription in the control panel.

cancelled.title: Cancelled subscription
cancelled.description: You have cancelled your subscription. You can subscribe to a new plan to continue using the Victus Journal.

trial.title: Free trial
trial.description: You are in a free trial period. You can subscribe to a plan to continue using the Victus Journal.

missing.title: Subscription not found
missing.description: You do not have a subscription. You can subscribe to a plan to continue using the Victus Journal.

freezed.title: Freezed subscription
freezed.description: You have a freezed subscription. You can manage your subscription in the control panel.
